notes:
Game: Pokemon Crystal (Chinese/水晶版). Player: 克里斯 (Chris). In New Bark Town.

STARTER CHOSEN: 火宝 = Cyndaquil (Fire type, 火球鼠). 

Controls: A interact, B cancel, D-pad move. Enter building = stand DIRECTLY below door, press UP.

Currently INSIDE Elm's lab, finishing dialog after getting Cyndaquil. NEXT: professor likely gives errand quest (deliver something / go to Mr. Pokemon on Route 30 near Cherrygrove). Then may need to nickname Pokemon. Keep pressing A to advance dialog.
summary:
Progress summary:

Playing Pokemon Crystal (Chinese/水晶版) as 克里斯 (Chris) in New Bark Town. Objective: get my starter Pokémon.

WHERE I AM: Inside Prof Elm's lab (空木博士研究所) — the large green-roof building at the north of town. I successfully entered and am now standing in the center of the lab. The professor is above me; the THREE red-and-white Poké Balls are on the table to the upper-right.

WHAT I WAS DOING: Advancing through a long dialog sequence with the professor by repeatedly pressing A. The professor received an email/mail mid-conversation ("啊！收到邮件了！" = "Ah! Got mail!"), read it aloud ("上面写着：'这次一定是真的！'" = "It says: 'This time it must be real!'"), and explained that he and his assistant are too busy researching to investigate it. He's now asking me for a favor ("拜托了，克里斯…想让你帮忙" = "Please, Chris… I want you to help me"). This is likely the errand quest that unlocks getting my starter. Still pressing A to advance the dialog.

WHAT WORKED:
- Advancing dialog: press A repeatedly (3 at a time works well).
- Entering the lab: stand directly below the door, press UP.
- Talking/facing NPC: face them orthogonally then press A.

WHAT DIDN'T:
- Nothing failed recently; the dialog is just very long.

IMMEDIATE NEXT OBJECTIVE: Keep pressing A to finish the professor's dialog. Watch for a menu/prompt (possibly a yes/no). After his speech, walk to the THREE Poké Balls on the upper-right table, approach one orthogonally, and press A to select and confirm my starter Pokémon.
